task: Write a Python function dedupe(items) returning the list with duplicates removed, preserving the order of first appearance. Note one edge case it handles.
trace: I used a Python set to remove duplicates since sets automatically eliminate duplicate elements. Then, I converted the resulting set back into a list to maintain the original order of first appearance. An edge case handled here is when an empty list is provided, as it will still return an empty list without raising any errors.
